votes.rationale: All 7 provider-backed command tests passed: draft, revise, and evidence with both OpenAI and Anthropic, plus default-provider confirmation. Structural governance files are deterministically generated and unaffected by provider choice. Stdout correctly identifies the provider in each case. Both missing-key error paths confirmed to fail before writes.

Functional parity is confirmed across the full provider surface. The proof correctly distinguishes functional parity from output-quality equivalence — both providers execute successfully and preserve trust boundaries, but narrative output quality is not compared or ranked. Error paths and structural preservation are validated.

Provider parity is governed and recorded. Both Phase 1 providers are formally validated across all factory commands. Neither provider introduces governance artifact drift. The Motion Factory v0 dual-provider surface is complete and proven.
